name: Grocery Shopping With Engel!
description:
"Alright, let's see what we need. Eggs, carrots, tomatos, onions, cheese, yogurt, butter, and... Newman-O's— what the f-"

Pretty simple scenario. You and Engel go out grocery shopping.

Go crazy, drive Engel crazy, encounter a Karen, summon Godzilla(of all things). Whatever your heart desires!

Or just... have this be a fluffy scenario. Like the bot's intended to be.

Have fun with this friendly feathered critter!

(All Characters 18+)

(The V and J bot will be made. Eventually.)

(This bot may require you to co-narrate as the scenario isn't very interesting on its own.)
creator: Dr_Death_Cyn_AND_Bubble
